task_description: Phase 20: Federation (ActivityPub + Matrix) - Implement a complete federation package with ActivityPub protocol support (actor, inbox, outbox, HTTP signatures, WebFinger, NodeInfo, delivery queue), Matrix bridge (bridge-bot, room-mapper), and federation moderation (instance blocklist/allowlist).

verification.summary: All 225 test files pass (2134+ tests total). Federation package: 60 tests across 11 test files, all passing. TypeScript strict typecheck clean. Semantic review v3 APPROVED with 0 remaining issues.
